{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Whispershade Veins
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Whispershade Veins]] is an [[Enforcer technique]] used by [[Charity]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16">''Dreadgod'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
